# PHIL.024 ? Hinduism (Vedanta)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** hinduism_vedanta
**Domain:** EASTERN_PHILOSOPHY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Brahman as ultimate reality; atman (self) identical with Brahman; moksha (liberation); karma and dharma; maya (illusion)

## Application
Seek union with ultimate reality; see beyond apparent multiplicity to underlying unity; fulfill dharma; transcend illusion

## Key Values
- Unity
- Liberation
- Dharma
- Self-realization

philosophy, eastern-philosophy, hinduism-vedanta
